notes: Anonymous dim block *D355 with DIM lines, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 10400, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Name *D355 plus entities only on DIM/DEFPOINTS: three dimension/extension LINEs, two DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT '\A1;10400', and three DEFPOINTS POINTs. No wall/plan layers or architectural geometry appear.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D* blocks composed of DIM-layer dimension graphics, arrow/tick inserts, numeric MTEXT, and DEFPOINTS are dimension caches, not building fabric.
rationale.counterfactual: If WALL/A-WALL polylines or hatch fills dominated without DIM ticks and numeric MTEXT, the role would shift away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot see which geometry is being measured or parent dimension style outside this projection.

notes: Anonymous dim block *D356: DIM lines, DIMDOT, MTEXT 1700, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Same pattern as other *D* defs: DIM-layer LINEs forming a dimension frame, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT value 1700, DEFPOINTS points only. No structural or furniture entities.
rationale.rule: DIM/DEFPOINTS-only anonymous blocks with dimension ticks and a numeric label are dimension annotation caches.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of continuous wall centerlines or double-line wall outlines on construction layers would raise wall_likelihood and change role.
rationale.uncertainty: Measured feature and orientation relative to the floor plan are unknown from the block alone.

notes: Anonymous dim block *D357 with DIMDOT ticks and MTEXT 865.

rationale.evidence: Entities are exclusively DIM LINEs, DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT '\A1;865', and DEFPOINTS POINTs; histogram matches a linear dimension explode cache.
rationale.rule: Classify *D* definitions with DIM ticks plus numeric MTEXT and DEFPOINTS as 치수캐시 regardless of measured length.
rationale.counterfactual: If MTEXT were room names and geometry were closed plan outlines on A-WALL, role would become 평면 부분도 or 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 865 is mm or another unit, and what object it labels, cannot be confirmed here.

notes: Anonymous dim block *D358 using _ArchTick arrows and MTEXT 2300.

rationale.evidence: DIM-layer extension/dimension LINEs, two _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 2300, and DEFPOINTS points form a classic architectural dimension block with no wall geometry.
rationale.rule: _ArchTick or DIMDOT inserts on DIM with DEFPOINTS and numeric MTEXT identify dimension caches.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing ticks with door/window symbol geometry or furniture blocks would flip role to 심볼 or 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Parent dim style and association to model-space geometry are not visible in this projection.

notes: Small anonymous dim *D359: _ArchTick, MTEXT 150, DIM/DEFPOINTS only.

rationale.evidence: Tight bbox with three DIM LINEs, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 150, and DEFPOINTS matches a short dimension cache; no wall-like thickness or plan layers.
rationale.rule: Short measured values still count as 치수캐시 when the entity mix is dimension graphics on DIM/DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs formed parallel wall faces with thickness on a wall layer and lacked ticks/MTEXT, wall_likelihood would rise.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell if 150 labels a gap, offset, or finish thickness without the surrounding drawing.

notes: Anonymous dim *D360 twin of nearby 150 measure with _ArchTick.

rationale.evidence: Identical structure to *D359: DIM LINEs, _ArchTick, MTEXT 150, DEFPOINTS; layers and inserts are annotation-only.
rationale.rule: Repeated anonymous *D* siblings with the same DIM/_ArchTick/DEFPOINTS recipe remain 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Non-DIM layers carrying solid fills or multi-segment wall paths would change the judgment.
rationale.uncertainty: Spatial relationship to *D359 and the measured edges is outside this definition snapshot.

notes: Anonymous dim *D361 with _ArchTick and MTEXT 3600.

rationale.evidence: Tall vertical span of DIM LINEs, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 3600, DEFPOINTS points—standard dimension explode content, not plan walls.
rationale.rule: Large numeric labels do not imply walls; DIM tick + DEFPOINTS pattern dominates role assignment.
rationale.counterfactual: If the long LINE were on a wall layer without ticks and paired with a parallel offset line as thickness, it could look wall-like.
rationale.uncertainty: What building element spans 3600 units is unknown from the block projection alone.

notes: Anonymous dim *D362 with five DIM LINEs, _ArchTick, MTEXT 155.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs include short extension stubs plus a dimension line, with _ArchTick and MTEXT 155 and DEFPOINTS—still pure dimension anatomy.
rationale.rule: Extra extension stubs on DIM do not create walls; role stays 치수캐시 when ticks and DEFPOINTS remain.
rationale.counterfactual: Closed rectangular outlines on architectural layers without dimension ticks would suggest 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Why five LINEs versus three in siblings is style-dependent and not fully explainable here.

notes: Anonymous dim *D363: five DIM LINEs, _ArchTick, MTEXT 190.

rationale.evidence: Same five-LINE dimension topology as *D362 with _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 190, DEFPOINTS only on annotation layers.
rationale.rule: Count of dimension LINEs may vary; DIM/_ArchTick/DEFPOINTS signature still means 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Furniture block inserts or equipment symbols instead of _ArchTick would flip toward 가구 or 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Actual host objects and chain membership among adjacent dims are not in this projection.

notes: Anonymous dim *D364 vertical measure with DIMDOT and MTEXT 215.

rationale.evidence: Vertical extension LINEs, horizontal dimension LINE, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 215, DEFPOINTS—classic linear dimension cache on DIM.
rationale.rule: Orientation (vertical vs horizontal) does not change classification when DIM ticks and DEFPOINTS dominate.
rationale.counterfactual: Parallel double lines with constant offset on a wall layer and no MTEXT value would increase wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot verify whether 215 measures wall thickness, clearance, or another gap.

notes: Anonymous dim *D365 with DIMDOT and MTEXT 275.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs forming extensions and a dim line, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 275, DEFPOINTS points; no non-annotation layers.
rationale.rule: DIMDOT-bearing *D* blocks with numeric MTEXT are dimension caches even with stub extension segments.
rationale.counterfactual: If entities included hatch or wall polylines and lacked DIMDOT/MTEXT, role would not be 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Context of the 275 measurement in the overall plan is unavailable.

notes: Anonymous dim *D366 tall span with DIMDOT and MTEXT 7175.

rationale.evidence: Long vertical dimension span using DIM LINEs, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 7175, DEFPOINTS—annotation-only composition.
rationale.rule: Large span values remain 치수캐시 when the entity set is dimension graphics on DIM/DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: A long single LINE on a wall layer without ticks/label could be misread as a wall edge, flipping judgment.
rationale.uncertainty: Which stories or zones the 7175 span covers cannot be deduced from the block alone.

notes: Anonymous dim *D367 horizontal span with DIMDOT and MTEXT 4750.

rationale.evidence: Two vertical extension LINEs, one horizontal dim LINE, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 4750, DEFPOINTS—standard horizontal dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Horizontal *D* dims with DIMDOT and DEFPOINTS classify as 치수캐시, not plan walls.
rationale.counterfactual: If the horizontal LINE were a continuous wall centerline with inserts of door symbols, role would change.
rationale.uncertainty: Endpoints' association to building elements is not shown in this definition.

notes: Anonymous dim *D368 wide horizontal measure MTEXT 10350 with DIMDOT.

rationale.evidence: Wide horizontal dimension: extension LINEs, dim LINE, DIMDOT, MTEXT 10350, DEFPOINTS only; layers are DIM/DEFPOINTS.
rationale.rule: Wide overall dimensions still follow the *D*/DIM/tick/DEFPOINTS rule for 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of MTEXT and ticks plus presence of multi-layer wall assemblies would flip away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether this is an overall building width or a zone length cannot be determined here.

notes: Anonymous dim *D369 short vertical with DIMDOT and MTEXT 660.

rationale.evidence: Three DIM LINEs, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 660, DEFPOINTS points; compact bbox and annotation layers only.
rationale.rule: Short *D* dimensions with DIMDOT and numeric MTEXT are 치수캐시 with wall_likelihood near zero.
rationale.counterfactual: Wall-layer double lines of similar length without dimension ticks would raise wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Measured feature type (opening height segment, offset, etc.) is unknown.

notes: Anonymous dim *D370 horizontal with DIMDOT and MTEXT 2070.

rationale.evidence: Vertical extensions, horizontal dim LINE, DIMDOT, MTEXT 2070, DEFPOINTS—dimension cache signature throughout.
rationale.rule: Apply 치수캐시 whenever anonymous *D* content is DIM ticks + numeric MTEXT + DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacement of DIMDOT with equipment symbols and loss of numeric MTEXT would suggest 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Link to specific rooms or walls is outside this projection.

notes: Anonymous dim *D371 with DIMDOT and MTEXT 920.

rationale.evidence: Two vertical extension LINEs, one horizontal dim LINE, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 920, DEFPOINTS—no wall layers or plan geometry.
rationale.rule: DIM/DEFPOINTS-only *D* blocks with dimension ticks are annotation caches, not walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Closed furniture outlines or chair/table inserts would flip role to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot confirm unit system or host object from the block alone.

notes: Anonymous dim *D372 chain segment with DIMDOT and MTEXT 585.

rationale.evidence: Same DIM LINE + DIMDOT + MTEXT 585 + DEFPOINTS pattern as neighboring *D* dims; purely annotation layers.
rationale.rule: Chain-segment anonymous dims share the 치수캐시 classification via DIM ticks and DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: If projection showed only wall centerlines and no ticks/MTEXT, judgment would flip.
rationale.uncertainty: Position in a longer dimension string and shared endpoints are not fully visible here.

notes: Anonymous dim *D373 with DIMDOT and MTEXT 495.

rationale.evidence: Vertical extensions, horizontal dim LINE, DIMDOT, MTEXT 495, DEFPOINTS—identical dim-cache anatomy to siblings.
rationale.rule: Numeric MTEXT plus DIMDOT on DIM with DEFPOINTS implies 치수캐시 irrespective of small measured length.
rationale.counterfactual: Non-numeric MTEXT (e.g. room label) with symbol geometry would push role to 심볼 or 기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact measured edges and continuity with *D371/*D372/*D374 need the full drawing.

notes: Anonymous dim *D374 wider chain segment with DIMDOT and MTEXT 1620.

rationale.evidence: DIM-layer extension and dimension LINEs, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 1620, DEFPOINTS points only; matches the anonymous dimension explode pattern.
rationale.rule: Treat *D* definitions whose sampled entities are DIM ticks, numeric MTEXT, and DEFPOINTS as 치수캐시 with empty wall_line_handles.
rationale.counterfactual: Wall-layer polylines forming thickness or plan partials without dimension ticks would change role and raise wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Host wall/opening association and whether this completes a continuous dim chain cannot be known from this projection alone.
